_note: 六十甲子籤 corrections - Based on research and traditional fortune poem knowledge. Original source chance.org.tw is currently inaccessible.
_source_status: Original source chance.org.tw is down. Corrections compiled from traditional fortune poem references and data analysis.

poem42._note: Fortune #42 currently has same poem as #7 - this is confirmed as data error. The correct poem for #42 based on traditional 六十甲子籤 versions needs verification from chance.org.tw.
poem42.story_reference: 白蛇精遇許漢文 / 龐涓孫臏學法
poem42._explanation: The poem for #42 needs verification against chance.org.tw when available. The above is a commonly seen alternative in traditional fortune systems.

levels._note: Traditional 六十甲子籤 level distribution. All 60 currently marked as 下籤 which is incorrect. The distribution below is based on poem content analysis (positive/neutral/negative imagery).
levels._distribution_summary: 上籤: 19首, 中籤: 26首, 下籤: 15首
levels._methodology: Levels determined based on poem content analysis: 上籤 = positive imagery (sun, flowers, good harvest, success), 中籤 = neutral/mixed (waiting, gradual improvement), 下籤 = negative imagery (danger, loss, obstacles, conflict).
levels._verification_needed: Confirm against chance.org.tw when site is available again.

上籤_examples.1: 日出便見風雲散 - sunrise, clearing clouds = positive
上籤_examples.4: 綠柳蒼蒼正當時 - green willows, right timing = positive
上籤_examples.7: 於今此景正當時 - flowers blooming = positive
上籤_examples.33: 選出牡丹第一枝 - peony, first branch = positive
上籤_examples.43: 禾稻看看結成完 - harvest complete = positive

中籤_examples.2: 靈雞漸漸見分明 - gradually becoming clear = neutral
中籤_examples.6: 東西南北不堪行 - cannot travel, but advises patience = neutral
中籤_examples.20: 財中漸漸見分明 - gradually seeing clearly = neutral

下籤_examples.10: 龍虎相交在門前 - dragon tiger conflict = negative
下籤_examples.11: 一重江水一重山 - difficult journey = negative
下籤_examples.14: 命中正逢羅孛關 - meeting obstacles = negative
下籤_examples.45: 虎落平陽被犬欺 - tiger bullied by dogs = negative
下籤_examples.55: 花開結子一半枯 - flowers withering = negative

poem15_and_16_similar.note: Poems #15 and #16 share similar opening lines '欲去長江水闊茫' - this may be intentional as they represent contrasting outcomes

recommended_action: When chance.org.tw becomes accessible again, verify all corrections against the original source. The poem for #42 and all levels should be confirmed.
